scripts.minify:css: cleancss -o assets/css/style.min.css assets/css/style.css && cleancss -o assets/css/features.min.css assets/css/features.css && cleancss -o assets/css/showcase.min.css assets/css/showcase.css && cleancss -o assets/css/extras.min.css assets/css/extras.css
scripts.minify:js: terser assets/js/script.js -o assets/js/script.min.js -c -m && terser assets/js/showcase.js -o assets/js/showcase.min.js -c -m && terser assets/js/features.js -o assets/js/features.min.js -c -m && terser assets/js/extras.js -o assets/js/extras.min.js -c -m && terser assets/js/mobile-perf.js -o assets/js/mobile-perf.min.js -c -m
scripts.build: npm run minify:css && npm run minify:js
